calendar.matters:
Petition To Close Decedent'S Estate Due To Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Oliver for Executor.

Mr. Oliver stated that he has not heard anything from the Executor, that he thinks the estate was opened because the Parties thought there was a life insurance policy and that he was given some documents regarding bank account balances when he first met with the Client. The Court stated that notice was given to the Brother and to the Creditors, and that there was no opposition. The Court terminated administration of the estate but not for lack of assets (subject to the Court revising the order). The Admininstrator will not be discharged but the estate is terminated.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

Petition To Close Decedent'S Estate Due To Lack Of Assets
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Continued To Jan-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Report Of Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Nov-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on November 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of A Status Report have not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
